title: An Ending (Ascent)
attribute_evidence_note: Listed in Apple Music Instrumental Essentials; no vocal performer credit on the linked recording.

title: River Flows in You
attribute_evidence_note: Official artist-approved sheet music labels the work Contemporary, Instrumental and scores it for piano.

title: Awake
attribute_evidence_note: Official artist Bandcamp track is tagged instrumental.

title: Merry Christmas, Mr. Lawrence
attribute_evidence_note: Publisher listing identifies the composition as an instrumental solo.

title: Space Oddity

title: Blinding Lights
attribute_evidence_note: Apple Music credits The Weeknd with lead and background vocals and displays lyrics.

title: All of Me
attribute_evidence_note: Apple Music credits John Legend with lead vocals and displays lyrics.

title: Don't Stop Me Now
